info.title: Routes Web Services
info.description: REST Services for managing the Route modeler.

get.description: Deprecated since R425, use routes/search instead

parameters.name: routeStateFilter
parameters.description: This parameter is used for searching the routes based on the state. This supports comma seperated values. E.g. Define,In Process,Complete. Default value is Define,In Process

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: This parameter is used for searching based on a keyword

parameters.name: queryLimit
parameters.description: This parameter is used for setting the queryLimit

parameters.name: SecurityContext
parameters.description: Security context the logged in user is using like ctx::RoleValue.OrganizationValue.CollaborativeSpaceValue

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Identifies the locale of the web request.

400.description: BAD REQUEST. The request could not be understood by the server due to malformed syntax. The client SHOULD NOT repeat the request without modifications.

401.description: UNAUTHORIZED. The request requires user authentication. The response MUST include a WWW-Authenticate header field containing a challenge applicable to the requested resource. The client MAY repeat the request with a suitable Authorization header field. If the request already included Authorization credentials, then the 401 response indicates that authorization has been refused for those credentials. If the 401 response contains the same challenge as the prior response, and the user agent has already attempted authentication at least once, then the user SHOULD be presented the entity that was given in the response, since that entity might include relevant diagnostic information. HTTP access authentication is explained in HTTP Authentication: Basic and Digest Access Authentication

parameters.name: SecurityContext
parameters.description: Security context the logged in user is using like ctx::RoleValue.OrganizationValue.CollaborativeSpaceValue

parameters.name: ENO_CSRF_TOKEN
parameters.description: The ENOVIA CSRF token which is typically required for update oerations.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Identifies the locale of the web request.

400.description: BAD REQUEST. The request could not be understood by the server due to malformed syntax. The client SHOULD NOT repeat the request without modifications.

401.description: UNAUTHORIZED. The request requires user authentication. The response MUST include a WWW-Authenticate header field containing a challenge applicable to the requested resource. The client MAY repeat the request with a suitable Authorization header field. If the request already included Authorization credentials, then the 401 response indicates that authorization has been refused for those credentials. If the 401 response contains the same challenge as the prior response, and the user agent has already attempted authentication at least once, then the user SHOULD be presented the entity that was given in the response, since that entity might include relevant diagnostic information. HTTP access authentication is explained in HTTP Authentication: Basic and Digest Access Authentication

get.summary: Gets a indexed search result of route.
get.description: This service uses the indexed data to search the routes. It will always return the latest revision of the route object.

parameters.name: routeStateFilter
parameters.description: This parameter is used for searching the routes based on the state e.g. Define,In Process,Complete. Default value is Define,In Process

parameters.name: searchStr
parameters.description: This parameter is used for searching based on a keyword

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: This parameter is used for setting the queryLimit

parameters.name: $skip
parameters.description: Represents the number of items to skip (to be used along with $top query parameter)

parameters.name: SecurityContext
parameters.description: Security context the logged in user is using like ctx::RoleValue.OrganizationValue.CollaborativeSpaceValue

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Identifies the locale of the web request.

The client MAY repeat the request with a suitable Authorization header field. parameters.description: include the related data objects i.e. tasks

SecurityContext.name: SecurityContext
SecurityContext.description: Security context the logged in user is using like ctx::RoleValue.OrganizationValue.CollaborativeSpaceValue

SecurityContext1.name: SecurityContext
SecurityContext1.description: Security context the logged in user is using like ctx::RoleValue.OrganizationValue.CollaborativeSpaceValue

Accept-Language.name: Accept-Language
Accept-Language.description: Identifies the locale of the web request.

ENO_CSRF_TOKEN.name: ENO_CSRF_TOKEN
ENO_CSRF_TOKEN.description: The ENOVIA CSRF token which is typically required for update oerations.

DemoteOnRejection.description: Demote content on Task rejection attribute.

preserveTaskOwner.description: Revert User Group(s) Assignment attribute value.

attribute[Route Base Purpose].description: Route Base Purpose attribute value. Deprecated since R425, use routeBasePurpose instead

attribute[Route Completion Action].description: Route Completion Action attribute value. Deprecated since R425, use routeCompletionAction instead

attribute[Restrict Members].description: Deprecated since R425, use attRestrictMembers instead

attribute[Preserve Task Owner].description: Deprecated since R425, use preserveTaskOwner instead

attribute[Auto Stop On Rejection].description: Deprecated since R425, use AutoStopOnRejection instead

attribute[Route Status].description: Deprecated since R425, use routeStatus instead

templateId.description: Use only if route needs to be created from template. If tasks is passed in payload, template data will be ignored

contentIds.description: Use only if content needs to be added to route at creation. there can be mulltiple ids seperated by |.

tasks.description: Tasks need to be added to Route

allowDelegation.description: Allow Delegation on Task object. Use only if value needs to be set TRUE

assigneeSetDueDate.description: Assignee Set Due Date on Task object. Use only if value needs to be set as Yes

instructions.example: approve the task if all approvals are done

parallelNodeProcessionRule.description: Processing Rule for same order tasks. Should be same for same order tasks. Otherwise result can be unexpected

taskAction.example: Approve or Comment or Notify Only

needsOwnerReview.description: Needs Owner Review for task. Pass only if need to set as Yes

taskAssigneeUsername.description: person's user name of the task assignee. if task is route owner task or assignee is user group, then no need to pass in the payload

assigneeId.description: id of the assignee. Use contextUser as id value if task is route owner task. If task needs to be assigned to User Group, pass the user group id.

routeTemplate.description: Use only if route needs to be created from template. If tasks is passed in payload, template data will be ignored. Deprecated since R425, use templateId instead.

name.description: Name of the object. Use only if name value needs to be specify.

selectUsersFromUserGroup.description: Select users from user group attribute.

preserveTaskOwner.description: Revert User Group(s) Assignment attribute value.

linkedRouteTemplate.description: Start Route on Completion template Id.

DemoteOnRejection.description: Pass only if linkedRouteTemplate is specified.Possible value is Yes/No. Default value is No. This attribute is used for Link Template.

routeCompletionAction.description: Pass only if linkedRouteTemplate is specified. Possible value is Promote Connected Object/Notify Route Owner.Default value is Notify Route Owner. This attribute is used for Link Template.

completionAction.description: Route Completion action on template. Possible values are Promote Connected Object/Notify Route Owner.Default value is Notify Route Owner. This attribute is used for template.

attribute[Route Base Purpose].description: Route Base Purpose attribute value. Deprecated since R425, use routeBasePurpose instead

attribute[Restrict Members].description: Deprecated since R425, use attRestrictMembers instead

attribute[Preserve Task Owner].description: Deprecated since R425, use preserveTaskOwner instead

attribute[Auto Stop On Rejection].description: Deprecated since R425, use AutoStopOnRejection instead

assigneeType.description: Assignee type. Please pass as Person or User Group.

assigneeId.description: Assignee Id. Use taskAssigneeUsername if id is not known.

taskAssigneeUsername.description: user name of the assignee. If id is known, use assigneeId instead in payload.

needsOwnerReview.description: Needs Owner Review for task. Pass only if need to set as Yes

routeOwnerTask.description: Use only if task is a Route owner task.

chooseUsersFromUg.description: Use only if assignee needs to be selected from specific user group.

routeOwnerUGChoice.description: Use only if chooseUsersFromUg is set as true. Specify the user group id.

allowDelegation.description: Use only if Allow Delegation value needs to set as true.

taskAction.description: Action of the task. Use it to create specific type of task

taskDueDate.description: Use only if due date needs to set. default assigneeSetDueDate is considered.

assigneeSetDueDate.description: Assignee Set Due Date attribute value.

relativePath.description: URI of the content if more information needs to be retrieved.

updateAction.description: To add, modify or remove the contents.

RouteBaseState.description: To update route blocking/base state value. Provide symbolic name of the base state or 'Ad Hoc' to set the blocking state as None. Optional for CREATE and DELETE actions and mandatory for MODIFY action.

RouteTargetState.description: To update route target state value. Provide symbolic name of the target state or ' ' i.e. Empty String when RouteBaseState is 'Ad Hoc'. Optional for CREATE and DELETE actions and mandatory for MODIFY action.

id.description: The object physical id or sometimes the object id.  Either id can typically be used transparently.

relativePath.description: Path of object if more information needs to be retrieved.

cestamp.description: The Concurrent Engineering (CESTAMP) of the object.

isLatestRevision.description: True if the provided route is the latest revision, otherwise False.

DemoteOnRejection.description: Demote content on Task rejection attribute.

preserveTaskOwner.description: Revert User Group(s) Assignment attribute value.

attrScope.description: Scope of the object. if scope is not organization or all, first value will be the type, second is name and third id of the object.

attribute[Route Base Purpose].description: Route Base Purpose attribute value. Deprecated since R425, use routeBasePurpose instead

attribute[Route Completion Action].description: Route Completion Action attribute value. Deprecated since R425, use routeCompletionAction instead

attribute[Restrict Members].description: Deprecated since R425, use attRestrictMembers instead

attribute[Preserve Task Owner].description: Deprecated since R425, use preserveTaskOwner instead

attribute[Auto Stop On Rejection].description: Deprecated since R425, use AutoStopOnRejection instead

attribute[Route Status].description: Deprecated since R425, use routeStatus instead

type.description: type of the object. it can either be Route Node or Inbox Task.

relId.description: relationship id between Route and Task/Route Node.

assigneeTitle.description: Title of the assignee. Use in case of User Group.

needsOwnerReview.description: Needs Owner Review for task. Pass only if need to set as Yes

chooseUsersFromUg.description: Use only if assignee needs to be selected from specific user group.

routeOwnerUGChoice.description: Use only if routeOwnerTask is set as true. Specify the user group id.

assigneeSetDueDate.description: Assignee Set Due Date attribute value.

relativePath.description: URI of the content if more information needs to be retrieved.

relId.description: Connection ID between Route and Content.

RouteBaseState.description: Route Base State rel attribute value. Shows the blocking state name

routeOwnerUGChoice.description: Use only if routeOwnerTask is set as true. Specify the user group id.

assigneeSetDueDate.description: Assignee Set Due Date attribute value.

id.description: The object physical id or sometimes the object id.  Either id can typically be used transparently.

relativePath.description: Path of object if more information needs to be retrieved.

cestamp.description: The Concurrent Engineering (CESTAMP) of the object.

isLatestRevision.description: True if the provided route template is the latest revision, otherwise False.

routeCompletionAction.description: Route Completion Action attribute defined for link route template.

completionAction.description: Route Completion action defined on template.

DemoteOnRejection.description: Demote content on Task rejection attribute.

selectUsersFromUserGroup.description: Select users from user group attribute.

preserveTaskOwner.description: Revert User Group(s) Assignment attribute value.

routeRequiresESign.description: Revert User Group(s) Assignment attribute value.

attribute[Route Base Purpose].description: Route Base Purpose attribute value. Deprecated since R425, use routeBasePurpose instead

attribute[Restrict Members].description: Deprecated since R425, use attRestrictMembers instead

attribute[Preserve Task Owner].description: Deprecated since R425, use preserveTaskOwner instead

attribute[Auto Stop On Rejection].description: Deprecated since R425, use AutoStopOnRejection instead

RESULTS-contents.description: The response data when the request succeeds with 200 status code.

relativePath.description: URI of the content if more information needs to be retrieved.

relId.description: Connection ID between Route and Content if content is added to Route.

RouteBaseState.description: Route Base State rel attribute value. Shows the blocking state name

RouteTargetState.description: Route Target State rel attribute value. Shows the target state name

RESULTS-contents-get.description: The response data when the request succeeds with 200 status code.

id.description: The object physical id or sometimes the object id.  Either id can typically be used transparently.

relId.description: The relationship physical/object id  when applicable.  For data retrieved through expansion, this field should be present.

tempId.description: When temp id is included in the payload during a create/post operation, it is sent back for reference.  It can be specified either as tempId or id during create.

type.description: The data object type; typically reflects the object's business type.

cestamp.description: The Concurrent Engineering (CESTAMP) of the object.

updateAction.description: This is relevant during an update operation to override the default HTTP method.

success.description: The response data when the request succeeds with 200 status code.
Reflects true to indicate successful request.

error-400.description: The response data when the request fails with 400 or 500 error.

error.description: An NLS error message.  In the case of a 400 error, the message is precise.  In the case of 500 error, the message is generic.

error-401.description: The response data when the request fails with 400 or 500 error.

error.description: An NLS error message.  In the case of a 400 error, the message is precise.  In the case of 500 error, the message is generic.

error-403.description: The response data when the request fails with 400 or 500 error.

error.description: An NLS error message.  In the case of a 400 error, the message is precise.  In the case of 500 error, the message is generic.

error-500.description: The response data when the request fails with 400 or 500 error.

error.description: An NLS error message.  In the case of a 400 error, the message is precise.  In the case of 500 error, the message is generic.

internalError.description: The technical reason of the failure - usually associated with a 500 error; this is not an NLS message and reflects the MQL or runtime exception.
